# Upstream Source: design-system

Original upstream folder:

`https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/tree/main/.claude/skills/design-system`

Expected local source path when the upstream submodule is available:

`external/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills/design-system`

## Purpose

Upstream design-system skill guidance for creating, reviewing, and maintaining durable design-system sources of truth, including master rules and page-specific overrides.

## Terranex usage

Use this reference together with `docs/design-system/MASTER.md`. Terranex's master design system is authoritative for Arabic-first, RTL-first, mobile-first financial UI behavior.

## Runtime boundary

This folder is reference material only. Do not import it into React runtime code or package it into the app bundle.
